out_of_scope_note: Neurostimulation methodology / biomedical optics study: monitors oxy-Hb hemodynamic responses in rat barrel cortex during anodal tDCS using fNIRS. No perceptual or cognitive task, no behavioural readout, no computational/theoretical model of neural coding or cognition. The paper's claims concern individual variability in DC-uptake speed and stimulation customization — physiological methodology rather than a theoretical framework about brain function.
